name: uracil-5-carboxylate to O-(S-3-oxohexanoylpanteth…
summary: A 11-step route from uracil-5-carboxylate to O-(S-3-oxohexanoylpantetheine-4'-phosphoryl)serine(1−) residue, ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: uracil/thymine dehydrogenase
reactions.equation: uracil + A + H2O = barbiturate + AH2 + H(+)

reactions.name: acetate--[acyl-carrier protein] ligase
reactions.equation: holo-[ACP] + acetate + ATP = acetyl-[ACP] + AMP + diphosphate

reactions.name: malonate--CoA ligase
reactions.equation: malonate + ATP + CoA = malonyl-CoA + AMP + diphosphate

reactions.name: 3-carboxymethyl-3-hydroxy-acyl-[ACP] synthase
reactions.equation: a 3-oxoacyl-[ACP] + acetyl-[ACP] + H2O = a 3-carboxymethyl-3-hydroxy-acyl-[ACP] + holo-[ACP] + H(+)

reactions.name: olefin beta-lactone synthetase
reactions.equation: a (2R,3S)-2-alkyl-3-hydroxyalkanoate + ATP = a cis-3-alkyl-4-alkyloxetan-2-one + AMP + diphosphate

reactions.name: 1-acyl-sn-glycerol-3-phosphate acyltransferase
reactions.equation: a fatty acyl-[ACP] + a 1-acyl-sn-glycero-3-phosphate = a 1,2-diacyl-sn-glycero-3-phosphate + holo-[ACP]

reactions.name: glycerol-3-phosphate acyltransferase (acyl-[acyl-carrier-protein]-
reactions.equation: a fatty acyl-[ACP] + sn-glycerol 3-phosphate = a 1-acyl-sn-glycero-3-phosphate + holo-[ACP]
